summary: Phase 3 Loyalty testing COMPLETE. Verified: Customer Loyalty 3-tab layout (My Rewards/Activity/Rewards), Tier Roadmap with 4 tier circles (Bronze→Silver→Gold→Platinum) and progress bar, Referral system backend endpoints (GET /referral, POST /referral/claim), and UI color refinements (referral card uses subtle blue/slate instead of bright green).

minor.issue: Tier stored in DB (bronze) doesn't match calculated tier based on total_points (4710 = should be silver). Tier is only updated via /earn endpoint, not recalculated on read.
minor.note: This is existing data state issue, not a code bug. Consider adding tier recalculation on GET or migration script.

backend.referral_get_endpoint: PASS - Returns code (ORYNO + last 6 chars of user_id), total_referrals, successful_referrals, points_earned
backend.referral_claim_own_code: PASS - Correctly rejects with 400 'Cannot use your own referral code'
backend.referral_claim_invalid_code: PASS - Correctly rejects with 404 'Invalid referral code'
backend.loyalty_program_endpoint: PASS - Returns tier, points, multiplier, next_tier info

frontend.three_tabs_visible: PASS - My Rewards, Activity, Rewards tabs all present

my_rewards_tab.tier_roadmap: PASS - Shows 4 tier circles (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum) with icons
my_rewards_tab.progress_bar: PASS - Shows 'Progress to Silver 100%' with progress bar
my_rewards_tab.redeemed_rewards_section: PASS - Shows empty state 'No rewards redeemed yet'

rewards_tab.reward_cards: PASS - Shows '15% Off Next Booking' with Bronze+ badge, 601 pts
rewards_tab.redeem_button: PASS - 'Redeem Now' button visible and styled

tier_card.gradient_header: PASS - Bronze tier has amber/orange gradient

referral_card.copy_button: PASS - Copy button visible with blue styling
referral_card.referral_count: PASS - Shows '0 Referrals' and '0 pts Points Earned'
referral_card.color_scheme: PASS - Uses border-slate-200, bg-blue-50, border-blue-200 (NO bright green gradient)

action_items: Consider adding tier recalculation in GET /loyalty/program to automatically upgrade users based on total_points
Or run a one-time migration to update existing loyalty_programs tier field based on total_points
critical_code_review_comments: Tier roadmap code uses emoji symbols (🥉🥈🥇💎) in TIER_SYMBOLS constant - rendering depends on browser/OS emoji support
Customer referral card correctly uses subtle blue/slate palette (bg-blue-50, border-blue-200, border-slate-200)
Admin stats cards use emerald gradient for 'Points Redeemed' which is acceptable for admin view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Loyalty features complete. Customer has 4710 points (showing as bronze but should be silver - see minor backend issue). Referral code format: ORYNO + last 6 chars of user_id. Customer Loyalty page has 3 tabs working correctly. Admin loyalty page tested in iteration_44.
